particulars.description: Land lying to the north of church road, stowupland, suffolk.

Land forming part of the old bell crowfield ipswich suffolk; any other interest in the property, the goodwill of any business carried on at the property, proceeds of any insurance affecting the property, all plant and machinery, equipment, furniture, tools and other goods kept at the property.
